visual.imageryMood: Serene and rejuvenating, with gentle ocean breezes and soft natural light.
visual.lightingStyle: Warm sunrise hues blending with open ocean vistas, reflecting tranquility.
visual.compositionNotes: Focus on expansive ocean views, peaceful ship corners, and subtle wellness cues.

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Depict the campaign theme as a believable modulation of ordinary cruise life, not as a staged demonstration of the niche itself.

humanRepresentation.castingGoal: Depict a believable, theme-appropriate mix of guests with varied visible backgrounds, skin tones, facial features, and ages where appropriate to the campaign.
humanRepresentation.ageRangeGuidance: Match the likely audience for the theme without making every subject the same age. Use variety unless the campaign clearly targets a narrower life stage.
humanRepresentation.diversityIntent: Favor visible diversity across the image set, including different ethnic presentations and skin tones, without reducing anyone to a trope or costume.
humanRepresentation.pairingGuidance: Across the full set, vary who appears together so the campaign does not default to one repeated demographic pairing.
humanRepresentation.stylingGuidance: Let styling reflect the campaign theme through clothing texture, grooming, and accessories while keeping people natural, modern, and cruise-plausible.
antiStereotypeRules: Do not stereotype ethnicity, religion, age, or culture through exaggerated clothing, props, or gestures.
Do not make one background the default while others appear only as token exceptions.
Do not use caricature, costume logic, or generic stock-photo diversity signaling.

messaging.elevatorPitch: Set sail on the Icon of the Seas and immerse yourself in a journey that blends wellness with the beauty of nature. Enjoy optional yoga sessions at sunrise, unwind with guided meditations, or explore art inspired by the sea, all at your own pace.
messaging.voicePersona: Calm and inviting, with an emphasis on relaxation and natural beauty.

starterConversation.content: Imagine waking up to sunrise yoga overlooking the ocean, followed by a day of relaxed exploration and optional wellness activities. It's a perfect blend of tranquility and adventure.
Do I have to join all the activities?
Not at all. Participate in what interests you, whether it's a drop-in meditation session or a nature walk during port stops. It's your cruise, your pace.
How does the cruise foster a sense of community?
By sharing experiences in a relaxed setting, like swapping wellness tips over breakfast or joining a casual evening meditation, you'll find natural connections with fellow guests.

communityExpression.corePromise: Embrace rejuvenation in a supportive, relaxing sea environment with fellow wellness enthusiasts.
communityExpression.participationStyle: Activities are relaxed, allowing guests to participate at their own pace.
communityExpression.socialGravity: Shared interest in wellness naturally connects guests, fostering easy conversation.
belongingSignals: Nature-inspired clothing, shared yoga practice, and casual wellness discussions.
solitudeAntiPatterns: Avoid pushing solo wellness; emphasize shared experiences.
communityExpression.visualTogethernessNotes: Highlight small groups enjoying quiet moments or sharing simple wellness activities.
communityExpression.copyFramingRule: Opt-in phrasing respects both introverts and casual participants.
activityInvitations: Join sunrise yoga on the top deck.
Drop by for evening meditation circles.
Explore nature trails during port excursions.
Gather for a calming spa session.

merch.conceptStatement: Cute t-shirt merch for Wellness and Nature Cruise guests

coreItem.designDescription: Wellness and Nature Cruise Club cute cruise slogan graphic
coreItem.dallePrompt: Create a print-ready T-Shirt graphic concept for the cruise theme "Wellness and Nature Cruise". Cute T-Shirt concept with cruise humor or theme-specific charm. Primary slogan/tagline: Wellness and Nature Cruise Club. Concept direction: Cute t-shirt merch for Wellness and Nature Cruise guests. Design direction: Wellness and Nature Cruise Club cute cruise slogan graphic. Print style: cute retro cruise slogan tee. Colorway: soft pastel cruise colors. Output a feasible apparel graphic for a real printable T-Shirt design. Use flat graphic composition, clean edges, limited print-friendly colors, and screen-print-friendly styling. Do not depict bags, leather goods, impossible accessories, product mockups, or non-apparel objects as the primary concept

merch.logoConceptDescription: A subtle design inspired by the sea and wellness, perfect for cruise memories.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Feel the gentle sway of the ocean as you embrace a voyage of wellness and peace on the Icon of the Seas.
audio.hypeClipScript: Discover serenity at sea. Join us for a rejuvenating journey where wellness and nature meet.
audio.voiceProfile: Soothing, with a hint of excitement for discovery.

identityBlueprint.emotionalPromise: The campaign feels quietly right for a particular kind of traveler without having to overstate itself.
evidenceOfBelonging: Nature-inspired clothing, shared yoga practice, and casual wellness discussions.
identityBlueprint.summary: calm contemplative campaign; favor quiet ship life with solo pair social scale and avoid staged theme spectacle.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: aspiring to tranquility while surrounded by the vast ocean
sceneLibrary.environmentDetails: ocean views with a light breeze
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Yoga deck, early morning, warm sunrise hues. Wide view of the ocean with yoga mats laid out neatly. A rolled-up yoga mat rests beside a water bottle. In the background, blurred figures in yoga poses enhance the scene.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: engaging in casual wellness discussions over a nourishing breakfast
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Oceanview café, mid-morning, soft natural light. Over-the-shoulder shot of a table with fresh fruit and smoothie bowls. A small plant adds a touch of nature to the table. Two guests, softly blurred, engage in conversation.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: finding peace while gazing at the horizon
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Private balcony, late afternoon, gentle golden hour light. A plush chair facing the ocean. A pair of binoculars sits on a side table. Hands rest on the balcony railing, enjoying the view.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: feeling awe at the grandeur of the ship's architecture
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Central atrium, midday, bright and airy. Low-angle view of the grand staircase. A decorative plant arrangement catches the eye. Blurred figures move up and down the stairs, adding life to the scene.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: feeling joy while enjoying a night of music and laughter
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Evening lounge, evening, soft ambient glow. Close-up of a cocktail glass with a small umbrella on a table. In the background, blurred silhouettes of guests enjoying the live music.

Wellness spa, noon, tranquil soft lighting. Eye-level view of massage tables with aromatherapy candles. A neatly folded towel is placed on a chair. Two guests, softly blurred, chat quietly in the background.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: feeling the thrill of new discoveries onshore
sceneLibrary.environmentDetails: vibrant local culture with natural beauty
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Tropical island port, late morning, bright and sunny. Wide view of the bustling port with colorful market stalls. A woven beach bag with local crafts peeks from a table. Blurred figures explore the area.

sceneLibrary.environmentDetails: opulent seating with a grand stage
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Main theater, evening, dramatic stage lighting. Over-the-shoulder view of an audience member watching the show. A program booklet rests on a lap. The stage is lit with performers in the background.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: enjoying the freedom of open-air activities
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Outdoor sports deck, afternoon, bright natural light. Eye-level view of a basketball court with a ball at rest. A water bottle stands next to a bench. Blurred figures play in the background.

sceneLibrary.subjectAction: experiencing awe at the natural wonders around
sceneLibrary.imagePrompt: Seaside nature trail, early afternoon, dappled sunlight. Wide view of the trail winding through dense foliage. A guidebook peeks from a backpack. Blurred figures explore the path ahead.

productionBible.globalDirectionNotes: Passenger-area capture rules: max two-person crew, one off-frame spotter, off-peak capture only, maintain single-file keep-right flow, and stand down immediately if passenger traffic builds or flow is impeded.
avoidDirectives: No repeated camera movement across consecutive shots
No crane, dolly, tracking shot, slider, or cable-cam language

stillLibrary.imagePrompt: sunlit deck with pair of friends practicing yoga, ocean as backdrop
stillLibrary.shotIntent: Showcase the invigorating start to a day with yoga on the deck.
stillLibrary.antiFallbackNote: Avoids cabin or window setup by focusing on outdoor activity.

landingStillBible.globalDirectionNotes: Maintain a consistent theme of wellness and nature across all visuals. Ensure scenes communicate the rejuvenating and supportive atmosphere of the cruise.
avoidDirectives: Ensure variety in location and social units across stills.
